candidates.why: Direct top-line revenue line with values across all years; more specific than subtotal rows.
Revenue subtotal matching the same values; useful fallback if primary label changes.

variables.notes: Selected revenue lines as a priority list, not to be summed.

candidates.why: Best direct COGS/cost of sales line; aligns with cost of revenues concept and appears as the main direct cost bucket.
Alternative direct cost label, but appears to be a component/subset rather than the main COGS line.
Direct production-related cost component, but incomplete versus full cost of revenues.
Inventory adjustment component, not full COGS.
Balance sheet asset line, not an income statement expense.

variables.notes: Chose the main direct cost line and excluded subtotal/component alternatives to avoid double counting.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: Explicit SG&A line and populated; per hierarchy, select only this row when available.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses including Stock-Based Compensation in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Valid SG&A component, but should not be used when an explicit SG&A row exists and is populated.
Broad overhead bucket, but too inclusive because it contains COGS and other operating items.

final_choice.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses

variables.notes: Explicit SG&A row exists and is populated, so selected only that row. Because the chosen row explicitly excludes R&D, no separate R&D line was added to XSGA_COMPONENTS.

candidates.row_label: Amortization of Capitalized Research & Development Expenses - Supplemental
candidates.why: This is amortization of capitalized R&D, not current-period R&D expense, so it should not be used for XRD.

candidates.row_label: Selling, General & Administrative Expenses excluding Research & Development Expenses
candidates.why: This line explicitly excludes R&D rather than reporting R&D expense itself.
Balance sheet asset line, not income statement R&D expense.
Balance sheet asset line, not income statement R&D expense.

candidates.row_label: Research & Development Costs - Accumulated Amortization & Impairment
candidates.why: Balance sheet accumulated amortization line, not current R&D expense.

variables.notes: No dedicated income statement R&D expense line is present. The available R&D-related labels are balance sheet asset/amortization items or an SG&A line explicitly excluding R&D.

candidates.why: Direct recurring interest expense line; preferred over broader finance totals.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense - Net of Capitalized Interest
candidates.why: Also a strong recurring interest expense line; appears equivalent here and could serve as alternate wording.

candidates.row_label: Interest Expense on Financial Lease Liabilities - Supple
candidates.why: Recurring finance cost component, but likely already included in total interest expense; selecting both risks double counting.

variables.notes: Selected the direct interest expense line and avoided adding lease-interest or net finance totals to prevent double counting.

candidates.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
candidates.why: Best owner/parent equity line and explicitly excludes minority interest, matching BE definition.

candidates.row_label: Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders
candidates.why: Equivalent parent-only equity concept and valid fallback if label changes.
Also appears to represent common equity attributable to shareholders; useful fallback.

candidates.row_label: Total Shareholders' Equity - including Minority Interest & Hybrid Debt
candidates.why: Contains minority interest and should not be preferred when parent-only equity exists.

final_choice.row_label: Shareholders' Equity - Attributable to Parent Shareholders - Total
Common Equity Attributable to Parent Shareholders

variables.notes: Priority list of parent-only/common equity labels to exclude minority interest from BE.

candidates.why: Direct balance sheet non-controlling interest line; preferred for MIB.
Equivalent balance sheet minority interest label; good fallback if wording changes.
Income statement allocation line, not book equity/non-controlling interest on balance sheet.

variables.notes: Selected balance sheet NCI/minority interest labels as a priority list.
